mapper.update: UPDATE CREDIT_DICTIONARY_VERSION SET items_json_path = #{itemsJsonPath}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE version_id = #{versionId} AND status = 'DRAFT'
UPDATE CREDIT_DICTIONARY_VERSION SET status = 'APPROVED', approved_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE version_id = #{versionId} AND status = 'DRAFT'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM CREDIT_DICTIONARY_VERSION WHERE status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY approved_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
